title: microlepia pilosella
intro: Microlepia pilosella, also known as the Japanese rattan fern or Japanese climbing fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Microlepia pilosella include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Microlepia pilosella can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, or it can be used as a poultice or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
